Part of the global Schindler Group, a Swiss multinational elevator and escalator company. Schindler Kenya has operated since 1972, supplying, installing, and maintaining elevators, escalators, and moving walkways across Eastern Africa. Located at Longonot Place, Kijabe Street, Nairobi.
Kenyan electrical engineering contractor based in Nairobi, established in 1998. Provides services to industrial and commercial clients. Listed on ZoomInfo with domain kalolwanga.com.

Electrical engineering contractors based in Nairobi, Kenya. Involved in electrical installations of major developments including skyscrapers, 5-star hotels and resorts, commercial blocks, and housing estates. Revenue estimated at $16.4M with ~13 employees. Located on Convent Drive, Nairobi.

Trusted electrical engineering firm with over 40 years of experience. Specializes in electrical contracting, power distribution, and ICT infrastructure solutions across Kenya and the region. Also listed as a solar system installer. Located at 8528 Ronald Ngala, Nairobi.
